headings.text: Folio3 Secures Microsoft Solution Partner Designation in Four Key Areas!

paragraphs: Home » Folio3 Secures Microsoft Solution Partner Designation in Four Key Areas!

Folio3, a leading provider of innovative and modern digital solutions, is thrilled to announce its recognition as a Microsoft Solution Partner in four integral areas: Infrastructure (Azure), Data & AI (Azure), Digital & App Innovation (Azure), and Business Applications.
This outstanding designation is a testimonial to Folio3’s unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional, Microsoft-powered solutions and services to its valued clients.

Following our previous success in garnering the Business Applications Solution Partner designation, Folio3’s Dynamics Division has now secured three additional Microsoft Solution Partner designations in the areas of Data & AI, Digital & App Innovation, and Infrastructure.
These recognitions showcase our excellent expertise and the ceaseless success we deliver to our clients across multiple industrial sectors.
To earn these top-tier partnership competencies, Microsoft requires partners to achieve at least 70 out of 100 points across three primary categories: performance, skilling, and customer success.
Folio3 has attained remarkable success and excelled in these areas, exhibiting its ability to meet and exceed the demanding standards set by Microsoft.
As a Solutions Partner for Data & AI, Folio3 has proven proficiency and excellence in aiding customers in managing data across multiple systems, building analytics, and implementing AI solutions.
This designation emphasizes our commitment to continuous training and accreditation, ensuring we deliver state-of-the-art solutions that accelerate customer success.

bodyHtml:
Table of Contents

Toggle
  • A Major Milestone for Folio3
  • Achieving Top-Tier Partnership Competencies
    • Data & AI (Azure)
    • Digital & App Innovation (Azure)
    • Infrastructure (Azure)
    • Conclusion

Folio3, a leading provider of innovative and modern digital solutions, is thrilled to announce its recognition as a Microsoft Solution Partner in four integral areas: Infrastructure (Azure), Data & AI (Azure), Digital & App Innovation (Azure), and Business Applications.

This outstanding designation is a testimonial to Folio3’s unwavering commitment to delivering exceptional, Microsoft-powered solutions and services to its valued clients.

A Major Milestone for Folio3

Following our previous success in garnering the Business Applications Solution Partner designation, Folio3’s Dynamics Division has now secured three additional Microsoft Solution Partner designations in the areas of Data & AI, Digital & App Innovation, and Infrastructure.

These recognitions showcase our excellent expertise and the ceaseless success we deliver to our clients across multiple industrial sectors.

Achieving Top-Tier Partnership Competencies

To earn these top-tier partnership competencies, Microsoft requires partners to achieve at least 70 out of 100 points across three primary categories: performance, skilling, and customer success.

Folio3 has attained remarkable success and excelled in these areas, exhibiting its ability to meet and exceed the demanding standards set by Microsoft.

Data & AI (Azure)

As a Solutions Partner for Data & AI, Folio3 has proven proficiency and excellence in aiding customers in managing data across multiple systems, building analytics, and implementing AI solutions.

This designation emphasizes our commitment to continuous training and accreditation, ensuring we deliver state-of-the-art solutions that accelerate customer success.

Digital & App Innovation (Azure)

In the sphere of Digital & App Innovation, Folio3 has triumphantly validated its ability to facilitate customers in building, running, and managing applications across multiple clouds, on-premises, and at the edge.

Our expertise in capitalizing on the tools and frameworks of our client’s choice sets us apart as a trusted partner dedicated to initiating innovation and excellence.

Infrastructure (Azure)

Folio3’s designation as a Solutions Partner for Infrastructure features our expertise to accelerate the migration of crucial infrastructure workloads to Microsoft Azure. This achievement allows our customers to recognize us as a partner committed to high training standards, accreditation, and customer success in infrastructure management.

Conclusion

By garnering these Solution Partner designations, Folio3 has positioned itself at the front-line of Microsoft’s partner environment. This achievement includes product benefits such as internal use rights, cloud licenses, Azure credits, and customer-facing badges.

Chery on top, Folio3 gains access to Go-to-Market services, technical pre-sales and deployment services, technical support, and eligibility to earn incentives.

Folio3 is proud to reach this monumental milestone, establishing and affirming our dedication to delivering exceptional solutions that empower our clients to achieve their business goals through the power of Microsoft technologies.

For more information, visit us at Azure.Folio3.
